flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cloud County Community College rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.6k → $4.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Cloud County Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.2k → $3.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Cloud County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Cloud County Community College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 (58.0% → 71.4%).
